name: tree-mapper
description: Generate a complete Markdown snapshot of any folder in your VS Code workspace — including a full directory tree and every file's source code.

treemapper.defaultIgnorePatterns.description: Rules written into .treeignore when it is created for the first time in a project. Edit to change what gets ignored by default. Has no effect once .treeignore already exists — edit that file directly instead.

treemapper.maxFileSizeKB.description: Files larger than this (in KB) are excluded from the snapshot. Default: 2048 KB (2 MB). The count of skipped files appears in the snapshot header.

treemapper.keepLastSnapshots.description: Number of recent snapshots to keep in the .tree/ folder. Oldest are deleted automatically after each run. Default: 10.
